contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Fix the-way-home-shop hero clobber on mobile
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/86
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Fixed the mobile layout collision on `partners/the-way-home-shop/index.html`. Two CSS bugs in the same hero block:
  
  1. **Absolute-positioned logo collided with flex-end h1.** `.partner-logo-container` was `position: absolute; bottom: 8rem` while the parent `.partner-hero` is full-viewport (`min-height: 100vh`) with `align-items: flex-end`. On narrow viewports the absolute-positioned logo landed on top of the heading, so the Agroverse header icon, the shop logo, and "The Way Home Shop" heading all clobbered each other. Dropped the absolute positioning entirely — the DOM order is `(logo div, h1, p)`, so plain block flow stacks them cleanly within the bottom-aligned hero content.
  2. **Malformed `@media` block.** Missing closing brace caused `body { overflow-x: hidden; }` to be syntactically nested inside the `.partner-hero-content h1` rule, with the `.nav-links` mobile override trapped inside the media query at the wrong scope. Hoisted `body { overflow-x: hidden }` to top level, properly closed the h1 mobile override, kept the `.nav-links` gap.
  
  ## Why
  
  Operator: "the way home shop doesn't look very good on mobile. The header image and the icon and the shop name are clobbered." Investigated the partners/the-way-home-shop hero CSS and found both bugs — the absolute-positioning was the visible symptom; the malformed `@media` was incidental but worth cleaning while in there.
  
  ## Out of scope (flagged in PR)
  
  The same malformed `@media` pattern exists on Green Gulch and several other partner pages — looks like a stale generator template. Green Gulch's `top: 2rem` absolute logo means the visible collision doesn't reproduce there, so I left them alone for a separate sweep PR.
  
  ## Operational note
  
  The PR commit accidentally included an unrelated untracked file (`docs/WHITE_LABEL_SUPPLY_CHAIN_HANDOFF.md`) from earlier session WIP that was sitting in the working tree. Used `git add -A` instead of the specific file path. No correctness impact (the doc was already supposed to land); just a less-than-ideal commit grouping. Future fixes I'll explicitly path-add to avoid this.
  
  ## Pull request
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/86 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
